attention4.ptxt: The slope sensor could not function if strong impact is applied.
Handle it with care so as not to drop it. Use hand tools instead of air tools when removing/installing it.

attention3.ptxt: Since the slope sensor has been removed or replaced, be sure to perform Slope Sensor Calibration . If it is not performed, some controls, including neutral idle control, could not function correctly.

s1.ptxt: Remove slope sensor with TCM from vehicle. Refer to TCM Removal and Installation
Remove slope sensor (1) from TCM bracket (2).

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Tighten slope sensor nuts (3) to specified torque.
Install slope sensor with TCM to vehicle. Refer to TCM Removal and Installation .
